case_title: YORKE, ERIC VS VERIZON WIRELESS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.00 FILED BY YORKE, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YORKE, ERIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS, INC. PLFT DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFT. PROVIDED EVIDENCE THAT PLFT WAS PRESSING INCORRECT NUMBERS OR NOT ENOUGH NUMBERS FOR A PHONE NUMBER PLFT'S ACTION WERE THE CASE OF THE SERVICE ERROR MESSAGES ON PLFT'S TELEPHONE. DEFT ALSO PROVIDED EVIDENCE OF TERMS & CONDITIONS INDICATING THAT PLFT & DEFT AGREED TO SETTLE DISPUTE BY ARBITRATIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COSTS FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERIZON WIRELESS, INC.
